Thank you for your interest in contributing to H5P! 🎉  
Please fill in the below sections to make your pull request:

**What kind of change does this PR introduce?**
(Bug fix, feature, docs update, ...)

**What is the current behavior?**
(You can also link to an open issue here)

**What is the new behavior?**

## PR Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] I searched for existing issues/PRs first
- [ ] I read the [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/h5p/h5p-example-contribution/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I described the problem and solution clearly
- [ ] I linked related issues/discussions
- [ ] I tested my changes locally
- [ ] I added/updated tests when appropriate
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I followed the project's [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/h5p/h5p-example-contribution/blob/master/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] This PR is focused and does not include unrelated changes
